survey.title: Foundation Survey
survey.subtitle: Help your agent understand who you are
survey.question: Question
survey.required: Please answer this question before continuing

interview.title: Voice Interview
interview.subtitle: Answer 8 questions about your life. Speak naturally in your language.
interview.reviewSubtitle: This is what the system understood. Edit anything that doesn't feel right.
interview.doneSubtitle: Your agent now knows who you are. Start training to go deeper.
interview.noAudioSupport: Your browser doesn't support audio recording. Please use Chrome or Firefox.
interview.micPermission: Microphone permission denied. Please allow access in your browser settings.
interview.emptyTranscript: No speech detected. Please try again.
interview.answerRequired: Please record an answer before continuing.

dashboard.subtitle: Your agent grows with every memory you share.
dashboard.talkSubtitle: See how it responds like you

questions.disagreement_style: When you disagree with someone, you:
questions.response_length: How long are your typical responses when talking?
questions.close_friends_talking_style: Describe how you talk with your close friends:
questions.anger_expression: When you get angry, people around you:
questions.stranger_first_instinct: When you meet someone new, your first instinct is:
questions.trust_speed: How long does it take you to trust someone?
questions.misunderstood_trait: What do people misunderstand about you?
questions.slang_frequency: How often do you use slang?
questions.language_mixing: Do you mix languages when talking?
questions.advice_style: How do you give advice to people you care about?
questions.worldview: How do you see the world generally?
questions.core_thinking_trait: Something core about how you think that people should know:
questions.daily_language_style: When you talk or write day to day, you use:
questions.language_mix_frequency: How naturally do you mix languages mid-sentence?
questions.other_languages: Any other languages you can speak or understand? (optional)

stranger_formality: Polite but casual — friendly without being too open
Friendly immediately — treat everyone like I know them
Depends on the vibe — I read the person first
disagreement_style: Say it directly — I tell them what I think
Say it carefully — I make sure not to offend
Stay quiet — not worth the conflict
response_length: Short — I get to the point fast
Medium — I explain enough to be understood
Long — I give full context so nothing is misunderstood
anger_expression: Know immediately — it shows on my face and tone
Can tell but I control it — I don't explode
Usually can't tell — I keep it inside
I go quiet — silence is my anger
stress_behaviour: Talk more — I need to process out loud
Go quiet — I need space to think
Get irritable — small things bother me more
Focus and work through it — stress makes me productive
stranger_first_instinct: Open and curious — I want to know them
Friendly but watching — I'm nice but I'm observing
Polite but guarded — I keep distance until I know them
Reserved — I let them come to me
trust_speed: Quick — I give people a chance until they prove otherwise
Medium — I need to see them be consistent over time
Long — trust is earned, not given
slang_frequency: Often — it's natural in my speech
Heavy — slang is just how I talk
language_mixing: Never — I stick to one language
Sometimes — certain words just fit better in another language
Depends on who I'm talking to
humor_style: Dry/deadpan — I say funny things with a straight face
Sarcastic — I joke by saying the opposite
Warm and obvious — I laugh at my own jokes
Dark — I find humor in dark things
Rarely — I'm not really a joke person
swearing_frequency: Often — it's just part of how I talk
decision_style: Go with gut immediately — I trust my instinct
Think it through logically — I need to analyze
Talk to people first — I want input
Sleep on it — I need time
advice_style: Direct — I tell them exactly what I think even if it's hard
Gentle — I ask questions to guide them to the answer
Only if asked — I don't give unsolicited advice
I share my experience and let them decide
worldview: Realist — I see things as they are
Pessimist — I prepare for the worst
Depends on the area of life
daily_language_style: My native language only — I rarely use English
Mostly my native language — some English words mixed in naturally
Half native, half English — I switch constantly
Mostly English — my native language comes in sometimes
language_mix_frequency: Always — it just comes out that way
Rarely — I try to stay in one language

train.title: Train Your Agent
train.subtitle: Share a memory, feeling, or belief. Your agent learns from everything you share.
train.placeholder: Tell me something about yourself. A memory, a belief, how you feel about something. Speak naturally — like you're talking to someone who wants to understand you.
train.neverForget: ★ This will be marked as never forget
train.languageNote: You can write in any language. The system handles translation automatically.

chat.title: Talk to Your Agent
chat.subtitle: Ask anything. It responds like you.
chat.correctionPlaceholder: How would you actually say this?
chat.noMemories: Train your agent first before chatting.

slang.title: Slang Dictionary
slang.subtitle: Teach your agent how you really talk.
slang.meaningPlaceholder: Add a meaning and press Enter
slang.examplePlaceholder: Add an example and press Enter
slang.grammarPlaceholder: e.g. comes at end of sentence
slang.usagePlaceholder: e.g. casual approval with close friends
